documentation.targetDocumentationURL:
openapi: 3.0.3 info: title: ebebek PLM Validation & Process API description: | Infor Fashion PLM (TRN) entegrasyon servisi.
Gelen StyleId için PLM'den style verisi çeker, iş kurallarını çalıştırır ve sonuca göre PLM'de status günceller (119 = geçerli, 117 = geçersiz). Ardından syncSearchData job'ını tetikler.
**İş Kuralları:** - Varyant tipi (MarketField5.Code): S / R / RB / N — çift taraflı renk+beden kontrolü - Aktif StyleSKU: en az 1 adet (Status=1, IsDeleted=0) - POM ölçüleri: tüm GradeMeasMetric değerleri > 0 olmalı version: 1.0.0 contact: name: ebebek PLM Team
servers: - url: https://ebebekvalidcontrol-dae721585e55.herokuapp.com description: Production (Heroku) - url: http://localhost:3000 description: Local development
tags: - name: Process description: Ana iş akışı — validasyon + PLM güncelleme - name: Style description: PLM style sorgulama ve validasyon (debug) - name: Token description: OAuth2 token yönetimi - name: Health description: Servis durumu
paths:
# ── ANA ENDPOINT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── /api/style/process: post: tags: [Process] summary: Style validasyonu + PLM status güncelleme description: | 1. PLM'den style verisini çeker (GET STYLE) 2. İş kurallarını çalıştırır 3. Sonuca göre PATCH STYLE → Status 119 (geçerli) veya 117 (geçersiz) 4. PATCH 204 dönerse POST syncSearchData job'ı tetiklenir 5. Her durumda HTTP 200 döner
**Infor ION input schema:** `StyleId-Brand-Status` requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/StyleIdBrandStatusInput' examples: ornek: summary: Örnek istek value: StyleId: "44562" BrandId: 13 Status: 1 Filter: "" responses: '200': description: Süreç tamamlandı (validasyon başarılı veya başarısız olsa da 200 döner) content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcessResponse' examples: gecerli: summary: Geçerli ürün value: success: true styleId: 44562 styleCode: "ADM-P-TEST090426" variantType: "R" validation: isValid: true errors: [] details: variantCheck: { passed: true, errors: [] } activeSkuCheck: { passed: true, errors: [] } pomMeasureCheck: { passed: true, errors: [] } patch: attempted: true httpStatus: 204 targetStatus: 119 error: null sync: attempted: true httpStatus: 200 error: null timestamp: "2026-04-10T05:51:39.946Z" gecersiz: summary: Geçersiz ürün value: success: true styleId: 44562 styleCode: "ADM-P-TEST090426" variantType: null validation: isValid: false errors: - "MarketField5.Code alanı boş veya tanımsız – varyant tipi belirlenemiyor" details: variantCheck: { passed: false, errors: ["MarketField5.Code alanı boş veya tanımsız"] } activeSkuCheck: { passed: true, errors: [] } pomMeasureCheck: { passed: true, errors: [] } patch: attempted: true httpStatus: 204 targetStatus: 117 error: null sync: attempted: true httpStatus: 200 error: null timestamp: "2026-04-10T06:00:00.000Z" '400': description: StyleId eksik veya geçersiz content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse' '404': description: Style PLM'de bulunamadı content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse' '500': description: Sunucu hatası content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
# ── DEBUG ENDPOINTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── /api/style/{styleId}/validate: get: tags: [Style] summary: Sadece validasyon (PLM'e yazma yapmaz) description: | PLM'den style çeker ve iş kurallarını çalıştırır. PATCH veya syncSearchData **yapmaz** — debug ve test için kullanılır. parameters: - $ref: '#/components/parameters/StyleIdPath' responses: '200': description: Validasyon başarılı content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ValidationResult' '422': description: Validasyon başarısız content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ValidationResult' '404': $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' '500': $ref: '#/components/responses/ServerError'
/api/style/{styleId}: get: tags: [Style] summary: Ham PLM style verisi description: PLM'den style verisini olduğu gibi döner (debug için) parameters: - $ref: '#/components/parameters/StyleIdPath' responses: '200': description: Style verisi content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: success: { type: boolean } data: { type: object, description: Ham PLM OData response } '404': $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' '500': $ref: '#/components/responses/ServerError'
# ── TOKEN ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── /api/token: get: tags: [Token] summary: Access token al description: Cache'de geçerli token varsa döner, yoksa PLM SSO'dan yeni alır responses: '200': description: Token başarıyla alındı content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/TokenResponse' '500': $ref: '#/components/responses/ServerError'
/api/token/info: get: tags: [Token] summary: Token durumu (token değerini vermez) responses: '200': description: Token bilgisi content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: success: { type: boolean } hasToken: { type: boolean } isValid: { type: boolean } expiresAt: { type: string, format: date-time } tokenType: { type: string }
/api/token/refresh: post: tags: [Token] summary: Token'ı iptal edip yenisini al responses: '200': description: Token yenilendi content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/TokenResponse' '500': $ref: '#/components/responses/ServerError'
# ── HEALTH ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── /health: get: tags: [Health] summary: Servis sağlık kontrolü responses: '200': description: Servis çalışıyor content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: status: { type: string, example: OK } env: { type: string, example: TRN } tenant: { type: string, example: HA286TFZ2VY8TRHK_TRN } timestamp: { type: string, format: date-time }
# ── COMPONENTS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── components:
parameters: StyleIdPath: name: styleId in: path required: true description: PLM Style ID (sayısal) schema: type: integer example: 44562
schemas:
StyleIdBrandStatusInput: type: object description: Infor ION tarafından gönderilen input — StyleId-Brand-Status şeması required: [StyleId] properties: Filter: type: string maxLength: 50 description: Opsiyonel filtre alanı example: "" StyleId: type: string maxLength: 25 description: PLM Style ID (string olarak gelir) example: "44562" BrandId: type: integer description: Marka ID example: 13 Status: type: integer description: Mevcut durum example: 1
ValidationDetails: type: object properties: passed: type: boolean errors: type: array items: type: string
ValidationResult: type: object properties: success: type: boolean styleId: type: integer example: 44562 styleCode: type: string example: ADM-P-TEST090426 variantType: type: string nullable: true enum: [S, R, RB, N] description: | S = Beden varyantlı R = Renk varyantlı RB = Renk + Beden varyantlı N = Varyantsız isValid: type: boolean errors: type: array items: type: string details: type: object properties: variantCheck: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ValidationDetails' activeSkuCheck: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ValidationDetails' pomMeasureCheck: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ValidationDetails' timestamp: type: string format: date-time
ProcessResponse: type: object properties: success: type: boolean styleId: type: integer styleCode: type: string variantType: type: string nullable: true validation: type: object properties: isValid: { type: boolean } errors: { type: array, items: { type: string } } details: type: object properties: variantCheck: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ValidationDetails' } activeSkuCheck: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ValidationDetails' } pomMeasureCheck: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ValidationDetails' } patch: type: object properties: attempted: type: boolean httpStatus: type: integer nullable: true description: PLM'den dönen HTTP kodu (204 beklenir) targetStatus: type: integer nullable: true description: PLM'e yazılan status değeri (119 veya 117) enum: [119, 117] error: type: string nullable: true sync: type: object properties: attempted: type: boolean httpStatus: type: integer nullable: true description: syncSearchData job HTTP kodu error: type: string nullable: true timestamp: type: string format: date-time
TokenResponse: type: object properties: success: { type: boolean } accessToken: { type: string } tokenType: { type: string, example: Bearer } expiresAt: { type: string, format: date-time } timestamp: { type: string, format: date-time }
ErrorResponse: type: object properties: success: { type: boolean, example: false } error: { type: string }
responses: NotFound: description: Style bulunamadı content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse' ServerError: description: Sunucu hatası content: application/json: schema: $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
